历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 19,849; in 2023, approximately 15,770 (significant forward shift); in 2024, approximately 17,064; in 2025, approximately 18,260 for physics category. The ranking has shown a fluctuating backward trend over the past 3 years, with a baseline of approximately 18,260 for 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Sichuan: 69 in 2022, 67 in 2023, 69 in 2024, 67 in 2025, and 74 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an expansion of about 10.4%, slightly easing competition, but the expansion rate is smaller than the increase in examinees.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 88th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with an upward trend from 102nd in 2024 to 86th in 2025 and 88th in 2026, indicating growing recognition. In 2025, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics incidents), but no major reputation events occurred in the 2026 cycle. Douyin popularity ranks 90th overall (average evaluation), with low attention on short video platforms and no abnormal signals in application popularity. Pharmacy is an A+ discipline (top nationally), and majors such as Traditional Chinese Medicine, Biopharmaceuticals, and Clinical Pharmacy all leverage the advantage of the A+ Pharmacy discipline, strongly attracting medical-related applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical and pharmaceutical majors remain consistently popular, with clinical medicine and pharmacy being highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of Sichuan Gaokao examinees is about 535,000, with an estimated physics category of about 329,000 based on historical proportions. China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local university. Its enrollment scale in Sichuan is relatively large (about 67-74 in physics category), making it a medical 211 with significant out-of-province enrollment, with no notable regional preference bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline rank of 18,260, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 10.4% (rank number increases), and the increase in Sichuan physics category examinees by about 15.5% (intensified competition, rank number further increases), both supply and demand point to a backward shift in rank. The predicted 2026 lowest rank for physics category is approximately 19,505, with a range of 19,005 to 20,005.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your rank falls within the predicted range of 19,005-20,005, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 Pharmacy Category and Clinical Pharmacy as main choices, Tier 1 Top Innovation Classes as reach options, and Tier 3 Traditional Chinese Medicine Category and Chemical and Pharmaceutical Category as safety options. If your rank is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 19,005), focus on applying for Tier 1 flagship majors. With Pharmacy being a top A+ discipline nationally, it is advisable to prioritize core majors such as Pharmacy Category and Clinical Pharmacy.
